description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior features a mix of white and gray surfaces, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. A private, fenced yard with green hedges surrounds the property, including a patio area with outdoor seating and a small glass-roofed structure. The house has a detached garage with a dark, pitched roof adjacent to the main building. The upper floor includes a balcony with glass railings and rooftop greenery, while the ground floor opens to a paved entryway and garden. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, minimalism, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, a fenced yard, and a detached garage, featuring minimalist design and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, balcony with glass railings, and a fenced yard with patio furniture.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached garage, side windows, and the green backyard with a small glass-roofed structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upper balcony, rooftop greenery, and the paved driveway leading to the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, glass-roofed structure, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with large glass doors, paved approach, and minimal overhang, no porch or decorative columns
